message:
feat(Lib): Implement 5 platform support CPython Lib/ modules in Zig

Implements platform-specific support modules:

- _aix_support.zig (~188 lines) - AIX platform support with version
  detection, library configuration, XLC compiler detection, system limits
- _android_support.zig (~242 lines) - Android support with API level
  detection, storage paths, permissions, logcat integration, Bionic compat
- _apple_support.zig (~280 lines) - Shared Apple platform support for
  macOS/iOS/tvOS/watchOS with SDK detection, frameworks, code signing
- _ios_support.zig (~297 lines) - iOS-specific support with device family,
  version detection, app paths, screen info, background modes
- _osx_support.zig (~325 lines) - macOS support with version names, Xcode/SDK
  detection, compiler flags, universal binaries, Homebrew paths, SIP detection

All modules include compile-time platform detection and comprehensive tests.
